provider: HKU Faculty of Arts BA(HDT) Syllabuses
note: The official syllabus applies to candidates admitted to BA(HDT) in 2026-27 and thereafter and is labelled pending approval on the official curriculum page. This supplement records 80 unique explicitly named courses: 14 artificial-intelligence-literacy and language-enhancement requirements, 7 compulsory Major courses, 55 HDT advanced interdisciplinary electives, and 4 additional courses named only in the Gaming Studies Humanities Focus. The other Humanities Focus disciplines require 42 credits from their respective Arts curricula but do not publish a closed coded list in this BA(HDT) syllabus, so they are not expanded here. The open Common Core Curriculum, 90-credit free-elective pool, unspecified Chinese-language substitutes, and additional prerequisite or co-requisite courses are also excluded. Advanced interdisciplinary electives and Gaming Studies advanced courses are available within Years 2-4 and receive no single recommended Year or Semester. Courses serving both the HDT advanced-elective pool and Gaming Studies Humanities Focus are stored once with both roles retained in group text. Recommended Year and Semester values are included only where the official syllabus explicitly states them; HUDT3100 remains unassigned because it may be taken in Year 3 or 4. Not all courses are offered every semester or annually.
